backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing formation order management, user profiles, and access control with admin/user permissions for order submission and retrieval.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the downloadable archive generation feature with associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON mapping of frontend file paths to their summaries, covering UI components, pages, hooks, and the admin export functionality.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, including colors for UI components, charts, and sidebar elements.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with meta tags, favicon, Inter font preload, and root div for React mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: React app root with TanStack Router configuration defining all routes including public pages, admin pages, and the admin export route.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteLayou: Main layout component with header navigation, mobile menu, authentication controls, admin links (Orders, Export), and footer with social links.
frontend/src/components/Section.tsx: Reusable section wrapper component providing consistent padding and container width for page sections.
frontend/src/features/formationWizard/fo: TypeScript types and default state for the formation wizard including company details, directors, shareholders, PSCs, and contact information.
frontend/src/features/formationWizard/st: Formation wizard step component for collecting company name preferences (up to three) and company type selection with validation.
Contact information step component that collects full name, email, and phone number from the user with validation error display.
Directors step component that allows adding/removing multiple directors with fields for personal details (name, DOB, nationality, occupation, address) and displays validation errors.
Persons with Significant Control (PSC) step component that manages PSC entries with personal details and checkboxes for nature of control (shares, voting rights, appointment rights, influence).
Registered office address step component with radio options to either use own address (with input fields) or use a registered office service.
Review step component that displays a read-only summary of all entered information including package selection, company details, registered office, directors, and shareholders.
Shareholders step component that manages share capital configuration and allows adding/removing shareholders with share allocation tracking against total shares.
React component for selecting Standard Industrial Classification (SIC) codes in the formation wizard, allowing users to add up to 4 codes manually or from a list of common codes with descriptions.
frontend/src/features/formationWizard/su: Utility functions for converting FormationDraft to FormationOrderInput and managing order confirmation data in sessionStorage, including save, load, and clear operations.
frontend/src/features/formationWizard/us: Custom React hook that manages FormationDraft state with sessionStorage persistence, providing updateDraft and clearDraft functions.
frontend/src/features/formationWizard/va: Validation functions for each step of the formation wizard (company basics, registered office, directors, shareholders, PSC, SIC codes, and contact info), returning ValidationErrors objects.
frontend/src/features/packages/packagesC: Defines the Package interface and exports a catalog of three company formation packages (Basic, Standard, Premium) with pricing and feature lists.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance using Internet Identity authentication, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for backend API calls including user profile management, formation order submission, order retrieval, and admin role checking.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a professional UK corporate theme using forest green and charcoal colors for both light and dark modes, including sidebar, chart, and component color tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, rendering the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminExportPage: Admin-only page that displays project structure and provides information about code export capabilities. Includes authentication and authorization checks before showing the project directory tree.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminOrderDetai: Displays detailed information for a specific order including customer details, company information, and additional order data. Requires admin authentication and fetches order by ID from URL params.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminOrdersPage: Admin dashboard showing a table of all company formation orders with customer names, business names, formation types, and action buttons. Includes authentication checks and loading states.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact page component with a form for user inquiries (name, email, phone, subject, message) and displays contact information including email, phone, address, and business hours with icons.
frontend/src/pages/FaqPage.tsx: FAQ page component displaying an accordion of frequently asked questions about UK company formation, covering topics like formation time, registered office, directors, SIC codes, PSC, and package differences.
frontend/src/pages/FormationWizardPage.t: Multi-step wizard page for company formation with 8 steps (company basics, registered office, directors, shareholders, PSC, SIC codes, contact, review), including validation, draft persistence, and submission to backend.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page showcasing UK company formation services with hero section, benefits cards (fast processing, security, documentation, support), and a 4-step process overview with CTAs to start formation or view pricing.
frontend/src/pages/HowItWorksPage.tsx: Informational page explaining the UK company formation process in 6 steps, listing requirements for formation, and showing a timeline from application submission to completion (24-48 hours).
frontend/src/pages/legal/PrivacyPolicyPa: Static page displaying the privacy policy with sections covering data collection, usage, sharing, security, and user rights under UK data protection law.
frontend/src/pages/legal/TermsOfServiceP: React component that renders a Terms of Service page with sections covering agreement terms, services, responsibilities, fees, processing times, liability limitations, and contact information for UK Formations.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmationPage: Displays order confirmation details after successful company formation submission, including order ID, company name, package details, and next steps. Loads confirmation data from local storage and shows a fallback message if no order is found.
frontend/src/pages/PricingPage.tsx: Presents three company formation packages with pricing, features, and selection functionality. Allows users to select a package which updates the formation draft and navigates to the formation wizard.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to extract, persist, and manage URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration for parameter persistence across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system, container settings, border radius variables, custom shadows, Inter font family, and accordion animations with typography and container query plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file documenting existing features for a UK company formation website, including marketing pages, multi-step formation wizard, package selection, order confirmation, admin view, visual theming, and asset generation requirements.
